changes: The hotbar icon for the PvE action Shoha is now clearly indicated when the action is ready to use.
Resolved an issue wherein auto-attacks failed to execute after performing the tank role action Reprisal.
Resolved an issue wherein auto-attacks failed to execute after performing the PvE action Rockbreaker.
Resolved an issue wherein the effects of the PvE actions Mage's Ballad, Army's Paeon, and The Wanderer's Minuet were not applied to the pets of party members.
Resolved an issue wherein the graphical effect for recipients of the PvE action Plenary Indulgence was not displayed correctly.
Resolved a known issue in The Epic of Alexander (Ultimate) wherein the Healing Gauge would retain its charge after a reset.

new_content.name: The Epic of Alexander (Ultimate)
new_content.description: A high-end duty featuring a ballad of hope and despair centered on a mechanical god.

new_content.name: Ishgardian Restoration
new_content.description: A collaborative project for Disciples of the Hand and Land to reconstruct the Firmament district.

new_content.name: Towards the Firmament
new_content.description: Quest to unlock the Ishgardian Restoration project.

new_content.name: Concerted Works
new_content.description: Collaborative tasks within the Ishgardian Restoration where players join forces to rebuild sections of the Firmament.

new_content.name: Skybuilders' Board
new_content.description: A board providing information on reconstruction status and details of upcoming concerted works.

housing.name: Imposing Ishgardian Shelf
housing.description: An exceedinly large frame that is so heavy it must be placed on the floor, rather than mounted on a wall. It features a striking image of Ishgard, so true to life that you can almost feel an icy chill exuding from the painting.

housing.name: Stuffed Hraesvelgr
housing.description: As few homeowners have the space to accommodate a member of the First Brood, this stuffed version of Hraesvelgr has been created especially for those who enjoy the sensation of an ancient dragon observing their every move.
